narrative:
Big Island Twp. township has 841 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
